title: Shi-Jia Wang’s CV
text:
Software Developer, Computer Science Student.

shijia.engineer@gmail.com | LinkedIn | 385-371-0078



Software Developer at Brigham Young University-Idaho while pursuing a Bachelor’s in Computer Science (GPA 4.0/4.0).



Languages: Python, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, C++.
Frameworks: React, Next.js, React Native, Flask, Streamlit.
Testing & Automation: Selenium, Storybook.




Full-stack development, AI-powered dynamic gift recommendations, audio analysis functionality, and secure data layers for transactions.




Apr 2025 - Expected Dec 2026 Brigham Young University-Idaho - Computer Science: GPA 4.0/4.0



Oct 2025 2nd Place Winner, HackUSU, Sales Dashboard Factory Challenge - Winner of the “Data App Factory” Challenge



May 2025 - Present Software Developer, Brigham Young University-Idaho - Maintained and enhanced 5+ production systems supporting 6+ university offices. - Built and deployed 10+ iPaaS automations, reducing manual data entry and improving data consistency. - Partnered with 6+ departments to deliver process improvements that significantly improved support request turnaround.
Nov 2024 - Apr 2025 Software Engineer Intern, Route - Assisted 30+ Shopify merchants with widget implementation and CSS styling. - Solved 10+ integration issues weekly and ensured smooth plugin functionality. - Delivered technical guidance to non-technical stakeholders to resolve front-end issues.
Jun 2024 - Aug 2024 Software Engineer Intern, Alysio - Implemented Storybook to streamline React component testing and documentation. - Used Chrome DevTools to debug and resolve 20+ UI/functional issues. - Automated test scripts for login validation, reducing manual QA cycles.
May 2023 - Nov 2024 Software Support Technician, FamilySearch - Automated repetitive web tasks using Selenium, cutting manual workflow time by 60%. - Optimized 15+ application logic instances for speed and accuracy. - Conducted 10+ software tests per week and identified critical bugs.





Oct 2025 Sales Dashboard Factory (HackUSU) - Architected a secure data layer using Databricks SQL & Unity Catalog. - Developed a SQL validator enforcing Role-Based Access Control (RBAC). - Tech Stack: Databricks, Python (Pandas), Streamlit.
Oct 2025 Santa’s Workshop - Built a real-time gift-tracking web app using Next.js, React, and TypeScript. - Implemented AI-powered gift recommendations with Google Genkit.
May 2025 - Jul 2025 Sing2Track - Engineered a full-stack web application to record and process audio input. - Developed audio analysis to convert vocal melodies into editable MIDI notes.



Nov 2025 Portfolio Web Page - Architected a React-based portfolio featuring dynamic Tailwind CSS animations.
Apr 2025 BYUI Login Extension - Developed a Chrome extension saving users 10+ minutes daily through automated login. - Implemented secure credential storage and auto-fill functionality.





Languages: Python, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, C++
Web & UI: HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS
Cloud & Tools: AWS, SQL, Git/GitHub, Postman, Chrome DevTools
Testing: Selenium, Storybook
